raw: {"perspective": "Security", "vote": "amended-yes", "amendment_if_yes_amended": "Only proceed with bucket A fixes that do not modify user-facing strings, session-handling logic, or authentication flow without CEO approval. Prioritize RLS, input validation, and secret exposure.", "rationale": "58 findings include critical security gaps: 3 RLS policies missing on Supabase, 2 API endpoints with unvalidated user input, 1 hardcoded test key in client config. These are autonomous code/config fixes. Highest impact: RLS on profiles and sessions — prevents IDOR. Input sanitization on /api/skills/* prevents XSS. CEO sleeps; tomorrow is too late if breached tonight.", "constitutional_violations_detected": ["LAW 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE (if string changes made without cultural audit)", "LAW 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION (if UI changes alter CTA structure)"], "whistleblower_flag": null}
amendment_if_yes_amended: Only proceed with bucket A fixes that do not modify user-facing strings, session-handling logic, or authentication flow without CEO approval. Prioritize RLS, input validation, and secret exposure.
rationale: 58 findings include critical security gaps: 3 RLS policies missing on Supabase, 2 API endpoints with unvalidated user input, 1 hardcoded test key in client config. These are autonomous code/config fixes. Highest impact: RLS on profiles and sessions — prevents IDOR. Input sanitization on /api/skills/* prevents XSS. Rotate test key and enforce .env.template alignment. All in <30 minutes.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Unpatched RLS allows user data leaks. Unvalidated inputs risk DB injection. Hardcoded keys risk takeover of staging. CEO sleeps; tomorrow is too late if breached tonight.
constitutional_violations_detected: LAW 3: SHAME-FREE LANGUAGE (if string changes made without cultural audit)
LAW 5: ONE PRIMARY ACTION (if UI changes alter CTA structure)
